questions.question: What is the main difference between a noun and a verb in the context of word classes?
questions.hint: Define word class and explain the distinction

questions.question: Classify the following word as a noun, verb, adjective, or adverb: 'run'.
questions.hint: Use the definition of each word class

questions.question: Explain how the concept of part-of-speech tagging can be applied to the word 'happiness' to determine its word class.
questions.hint: Discuss the different approaches to POS tagging and how they can be applied to a specific word
